{{Infobox concept
| name = Ragnarus Incarnation
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Ragnarus Incarnation Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Ragnarus [[Incarnation]] is a powerful, noble entity that functions as a force of nature. While possessing immense strength, these beings are prone to madness if they remain in the world for too long, behaving like feral animals. The Ragnarus [[Incarnation]] currently rules over [[Damasca]], a city that has kept various [[Incarnations]] imprisoned and mistreated for three centuries. This specific entity is characterized by a straightforward nature, seeking power regardless of the cost and utilizing direct methods to destroy targets. The [[Incarnation]]'s motivations are driven by a desire to transform the world into [[Valinhall]], a realm defined by constant combat and merit-based survival. Historically, the [[Incarnations]] were protected by [[Elysia]] before Ragnarus took on that role. They are kept in check by artifacts of Ragnarus and specific [[Trees]], though the destruction of these [[Trees]] brings them closer to freedom. A seed is noted as one of the few things capable of returning them to their confinement, provided it is not intercepted by a [[Ragnarus Traveler]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] has skin that is hard and blood-red like crimson metal.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]]'s eyes are red flames.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Once sealed within a dungeon located beneath the [[Blue Room]], the Ragnarus [[Incarnation]] is an individual who may have been trapped in [[Cana]] or chose to trap themselves. [[Simon]] suspected that this immortal being held the [[Overlord of Cana]] under his control before the entity shouted a declaration of intent to attack [[Enosh]]. During their confrontation, [[Simon]] struck the Ragnarus [[Incarnation]]'s shield with his shoulder. While being sealed beneath a [[Hanging Tree]] is considered a [[fate]] worse than death for such a being, the Ragnarus [[Incarnation]]'s eventual departure resulted in the surrender of the [[Damascans]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] was once sealed in a dungeon beneath the [[Blue Room]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] is a person who may have been trapped in [[Cana]] or trapped themselves.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] considers the possibility that the [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] has the [[Overlord of Cana]] under his control.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] shouted that he was going to attack [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] hit the [[Ragnarus Incarnation]]’s shield with his shoulder.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] is an immortal body.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|It is a [[fate]] worse than death for a [[Ragnarus Incarnation]] to be sealed beneath a [[Hanging Tree]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus Incarnation]]'s departure led to the surrender of the [[Damascans]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
